name: @stackra/coordinator
purpose: Cross-tab coordination for browser apps — leader election, distributed locks over Web Locks + BroadcastChannel, and event relay across tabs.
capabilities: Compare-and-swap locks (Web Locks API with localStorage fallback)
Deduplicated cross-tab side effects (sync, push, refresh)
when_to_use: Deduplicating side effects (sync push, refresh token rotation, notification click) across multiple browser tabs.
when_not_to_use: For single-tab pub/sub use @stackra/events; for persistent job scheduling use @stackra/scheduler.
